Definition (C:\Users\ahumeaub\Desktop\CLionProject\TestAffichageSynchrone\include\LibVLC\include\vlc\plugins\vlc_meta.h)

  • Program Listing for File vlc_meta.h

Detailed Description

This file defines functions and structures for stream meta-data in vlc

Included By

  • File vlc_events.h

  • File vlc_fingerprinter.h

  • File vlc_input.h

  • File vlc_input_item.h
